name: set_instance_machine_type
description: Sets the machine type for a stopped Google Compute Engine instance to the specified machine type. Requires project, zone, instance name and machine type as input. Proceed only if there is no error in response and the status of the operation is `DONE` without any errors. To get details of the operation, use the `get_zone_operation` tool.

parameters.description: Request message for setting machine type.

machineType.description: Required. The machine type of the instance.

project.description: Required. Project ID for this request.

zone.description: Required. The zone of the instance.
